prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, a common approach for modeling equity prices. Given the current price of $756.47 and a prediction horizon of 18 days, the model incorporates an assumed annualized drift (expected return) of 5% and an annualized volatility of 20%. These parameters are converted to daily equivalents. The point estimate is the expected value of the price after 18 days, accounting for the drift and volatility. The confidence intervals are constructed using the standard deviation of the log-returns over the 18-day period and corresponding Z-scores for the specified confidence levels (50%, 80%, 90%). All price figures are rounded to two decimal places.
